title: PatternLogin
description: An authentication plugin for offline mode servers
body:
![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/577aeb6fff80c9704d9f098d1c0c53a650127f93.png)


![overview_info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d759bd792ea9e8c194ba99c6b6cb5d29edcfa4d.png)

![placeholders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b856d23f3489853e92015b426fafb0adb7d227e.png)

![placeholders_info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/40bf84f534c59fb6bde3ae8aef4b00c1c4b67b1a.png)

![installation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37663ad1fe40b1f1cff3e8b6b3be424ed42faf6b.png)

- Download the plugin according to your server version
- Paste it in the plugins folder of your server 
- Restart the server
- Done!..
